record.field: Standard salary structure for Zimbabwean employees. Includes Basic, Housing, Transport, NSSA, PAYE, AIDS Levy, and NEC.

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval: [ (4, ref('zim_rule_basic')), (4, ref('zim_rule_housing')), (4, ref('zim_rule_transport')), (4, ref('zim_rule_fuel')), (4, ref('zim_rule_meal')), (4, ref('zim_rule_overtime')), (4, ref('zim_rule_bonus')), (4, ref('zim_rule_backpay')), (4, ref('zim_rule_leavepay')), (4, ref('zim_rule_gross')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nssa_employee')), (4, ref('zim_rule_pension')), (4, ref('zim_rule_medical')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nec')), (4, ref('zim_rule_taxable')), (4, ref('zim_rule_paye')), (4, ref('zim_rule_aids')), (4, ref('zim_rule_loan')), (4, ref('zim_rule_union')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nssa_employer')), (4, ref('zim_rule_net')) ]

record.field: Executive salary structure with additional allowances.

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval: [ (4, ref('zim_rule_basic')), (4, ref('zim_rule_transport')), (4, ref('zim_rule_overtime')), (4, ref('zim_rule_gross')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nssa_employee')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nec')), (4, ref('zim_rule_taxable')), (4, ref('zim_rule_paye')), (4, ref('zim_rule_aids')), (4, ref('zim_rule_nssa_employer')), (4, ref('zim_rule_net')) ]

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval: [ (4, ref('zim_rule_basic')), (4, ref('zim_rule_gross')), (4, ref('zim_rule_taxable')), (4, ref('zim_rule_paye')), (4, ref('zim_rule_aids')), (4, ref('zim_rule_net')) ]
